case_title: MARLIN LEASING CORPORATION VS. JOSEPH KHALAF

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KHALAF, JOSEPH DBA UP N SMOKE $8,494.30 PRINCIPAL, $175.82 INTEREST, $104.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,774.12, TOTAL AMOUNT OF JUDGMENT - $8774.12, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT. ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
